title: chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. discoideum
intro: Chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. discoideum, also known as the Korean chamomile, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine. It has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to calm anxiety, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Chrysanthemum lavandulifolium var. discoideum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal and health benefits.
